title: Silky Salmon Sushi Rolls
description: An Italian twist on classic sushi rolls, featuring salmon and silky textures.
instructions: Prepare sushi rice according to package instructions.
Cut the salmon fillet into thin slices.
Crumble the silky tofu and set aside.
In a small saucepan, whisk together the rice vinegar and salt.
In a large bowl, combine the sushi rice and vinegar mixture.
Lay a sheet of sushi nori flat on a cutting board.
Spread a thin layer of sushi rice onto the nori.
Place a few slices of salmon and some crumbled tofu onto the rice.
Roll the sushi using a bamboo sushi mat.
Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients.
Slice the rolls into individual pieces and serve.
